note: Template only. Create fresh jobs in the target environment rather than copying IDs or runtime state. Tick type is carried in the payload text so HEARTBEAT.md can dispatch.

payload.text: sensor-sweep. Use the plant-monitor skill. Read every sensor, update memory/sensor-state.json, and only message the operator if a new or worsening detection needs attention.
care-decision. Use the plant-care skill. Evaluate watering, grow-light, and fan based on the latest memory/sensor-state.json. Honor cooldowns and the read_only flag in TOOLS.md.
grow-light-check. Use the plant-care skill. Align the grow-light relay with the configured on/off window in TOOLS.md. Do nothing if the state already matches.
photo-capture. Use the plant-monitor skill. Capture a photo and record it in memory/sensor-state.json. Do not analyze it yet — the daily-log tick will.
photo-capture. Use the plant-monitor skill. Capture a photo and record it in memory/sensor-state.json.

payload.message: daily-log. Use the plant-monitor skill. Summarize today's readings, analyze the latest photo using the observation cues in AGENTS.md, and append one dated entry to memory/growth-log.md. Message the operator only if a new failure mode was detected.
